channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Argentina's political banner sparks controversy at FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Argentina's football team has reignited international debate by displaying a banner claiming the Falkland Islands belong to Argentina during the FIFA World Cup 2026. Australian resident Sally Poncet, ...

item.title: Evacuation Order Issued for Over 100 Properties Amid Rapid Growth of Big Bar Lake Wildfire
item.description: An evacuation order has been issued for more than 100 properties surrounding Big Bar Lake in British Columbia's southern Cariboo region due to the rapid spread of the Fiftynine Creek wildfire. The fir...

item.title: Boosie Badazz's Refund Demand Highlights Trump's Pardon Controversy
item.description: Rapper Boosie Badazz's demand for a $600,000 refund from MAGA operatives he believed could secure a Trump administration pardon has sparked ridicule, with critics highlighting the chaotic state of the...

item.title: Wildfires in Canada and Minnesota Spread Smoke Across U.S., Impacting Washington D.C.
item.description: Millions of people across the Great Lakes, Northeast, and Mid-Atlantic states are experiencing unhealthy air quality due to wildfires burning in Ontario, Canada, and the Boundary Waters Canoe Area Wil...

item.title: Canberra police seize drugs and assets in major cocaine trafficking bust
item.description: A 32-year-old man from Conder has been arrested by ACT Policing as part of Operation Campania, an intelligence-led initiative targeting illicit drug supply. The operation involved executing multiple s...

item.title: Tanzania explores public-private partnerships to boost major infrastructure projects
item.description: The article discusses Tanzania's proposed partnership approach to improve returns from its major public projects. The initiative aims to attract private sector investment and expertise to enhance the ...

item.title: Three-year-old child's body found in stormwater reservoir after disappearance
item.description: The body of a three-year-old child has been recovered from a stormwater reservoir in New Horizons, Plettenberg Bay, following reports of the toddler's disappearance. The National Sea Rescue Institute ...

item.title: Vatican Hosts Global Assembly to Draft Rome Declaration for Unarmed and Disarming Peace
item.description: The Vatican is hosting the Global Nobel Laureates Assembly on Artificial Intelligence and Nuclear War from July 14 to 16, focusing on the search for a new global paradigm that combines innovation, res...

item.title: FAAC Allocates N2.55trn to Federal, State, and Local Governments in June 2026
item.description: The Federation Account Allocation Committee (FAAC) disbursed a record N2.55 trillion to federal, state, and local governments in June 2026, marking the highest monthly allocation of the year. This com...

item.title: Stacey Abrams Condemns Tommy Tuberville's Voter Fraud Claims and Gubernatorial Ambitions
item.description: Stacey Abrams, a prominent anti-authoritarianism activist and former Georgia Rep., criticized U.S. Senator Tommy Tuberville (R-AL) for his recent remarks on voter fraud and his potential gubernatorial...

item.title: Binibining Pilipinas 2026 Coronation Night: Candidates and Events
item.description: The Binibining Pilipinas 2026 coronation night is set for July 18 at the Smart Araneta Coliseum in Quezon City, featuring 35 candidates competing for the Bb. Pilipinas International and Globe titles. ...

item.title: Turner Isoun's legacy: How Nigeria's digital revolution began
item.description: Turner Timinipre Isoun, a former Nigerian minister of Science and Technology, passed away at 87, leaving behind a legacy that transformed the country's digital landscape. His policies during the Obasa...

item.title: Tanzania enhances efforts to tackle human trafficking
item.description: Tanzania has intensified its measures to address human trafficking through comprehensive strategies aimed at prevention, protection, and prosecution. The government has collaborated with local and int...

item.title: Bahati Responds to Organ Harvesting Allegations with Leaked Police Report
item.description: Celebrated Kenyan musician Bahati has addressed claims that he harvests organs from young women, sharing a leaked police report involving the same man who accused him. The controversy began when Kevin...

item.title: Media prank: Bruce Bouchet's $7 domain purchase sparked false collaboration rumors between Kyle Sandilands and Karl Stefanovic
item.description: Bruce Bouchet, long-time manager of shock jock Kyle Sandilands, has admitted he orchestrated the infamous rumor that the controversial media personalities were collaborating on a new project. The pran...

item.title: Asiatic Lions Rely on Wild Prey, Study Shows
item.description: A study published in Conservation journal reveals that Asiatic lions in Gujarat's coastal regions primarily rely on wild prey rather than livestock. Researchers analyzed 160 lion scat samples from Jun...

item.title: France dominate Japan 42-15 in Tokyo rugby clash
item.description: In a high-tempo rugby encounter at the National Stadium in Tokyo, France secured a decisive 42-15 victory over Japan, marking their first leg of the inaugural Nations Championship. The Six Nations hol...

item.title: Protester faces multiple police charges over protest actions, with authorities citing misconduct investigations
item.description: Ms Barnes, an activist involved in environmental protests, has faced numerous legal cases against her by Norfolk Police between 2020 and 2024. While she received a conditional discharge for criminal d...

item.title: Republican Senator Considers Run After Trump Endorsement Snub
item.description: Republican Senator Russell Fry of South Carolina expressed uncertainty about his political future after being overlooked by President Donald Trump during his endorsement of Darline Graham Nordone for ...

item.title: DPM Dar and Kuwait FM Discuss Regional Stability and Islamabad MoU Compliance
